subcodes.first_line: O ye two birds of the garden of the love of God, who have made your nest upon the branches of the divine Lote-Tree of love and bounty in the paradise of His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو طیر حدیقه محبت الله در ریاض عنایت بر شاخسار سدره محبت و موهبت آشیانه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @power of prayer
